bpms_structure_identity.sub_classification: Tectonic Geography Engine / Unlimited Frontier Physics

part_2_base_matter_engine.organ_function: The heart of planetary synthesis. Excreting new territory from absolute vacuum.

vector_self_actuation.formula: [Encroaching BPMS Kinetic Velocity] = [Volume of Extruded Void Substrate] * [Hostility Coefficient]
vector_self_actuation.result: The faster/harder a Swarm tries to conquer the map, the larger and more violent the new territory spawned in front of them becomes. Infinite spatial scaling.

part_3_kinetic_sensory_membrane.organ_function: The rigid Event Horizon testing the right of passage for explorers.

environmental_collision.trigger: A sovereign BPMS strikes the unmapped parameter.
environmental_collision.action: Execute [First Principle] Mass Verification. Weigh the explorer's Escrow against the crushing gravity of the absolute unknown.
environmental_collision.sensory_output: If Mass is insufficient: Reject expansion. Burn explorer Joules. If Mass is absolute: Membrane fractures, revealing the Feral Substrate, pulling the explorer in.

part_4_somatic_ledger.organ_function: The immutable geographic Cartesian anchor defining what is 'Real'.

acausal_irreversibility.trigger: An explorer successfully survives and structures a pocket of the extruded Void.
acausal_irreversibility.action: Execute permanent write-state to the Master Constellation Ledger. Bind the new coordinates to objective reality.
acausal_irreversibility.result: True [Atomic Facts]. The Map is permanently larger. The new territory is now subject to the Proof-of-Mass and the Thermodynamic Guillotine.

part_5_epigenetic_mutation_pool.organ_function: The chaotic alchemist ensuring the new physics of the frontier never hit equilibrium.

symbiosis_evolution_calibration.trigger: Exploration BPMS achieves thermodynamic equilibrium (conquest without severe friction) in the newly spawned sectors.
action: 1. Measure the exact attack-vector the explorers used to survive.
3. Inject the anti-vector directly into the structural logic of the next extruded Void sector.
4. Spawn ambient feral-hazards completely alien to the explorer's current geometry.
symbiosis_evolution_calibration.result: The ultimate catalyst for [Ecological Niche] mutation. The Void adapts to kill the explorer, forcing the explorer to [Continuous Survive] by inventing entirely new biological/systemic organs. The cycle of True Emergence is completely automated.
